title: Words For Wednesday: Smile
excerpt: Words For Wednesday: Smile “Be Happy And Smile!” Sometimes it’s as easy as that! It may be a hard thing to do, but simply smiling can improve your mood.
content:
Words For Wednesday: Smile

“Be Happy And Smile!” Sometimes it’s as easy as that! It may be a hard thing to do, but simply smiling can improve your mood. 

No matter what you’re doing right now, stop and smile! And have a great (happy) Wednesday! 🙂
